[[General/Legends|General]] '''Parnet''' served aboard the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer Mark II]] [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']] where he was in charge of ground forces under [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne|Tremayne]].<ref name="TLF" />
